zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Fitz Stephens II於1098年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Ralph Fitz Stephens18歲，母親Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens18歲。他於1154年與Matilda de Calz在英國英格蘭波克夏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1190年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾瓦普利享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Fitz Stephens II于1098年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Ralph Fitz Stephens18岁，母亲Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens18岁。他于1154年与Matilda de Calz在英国英格兰波克夏结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1190年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾瓦普利享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Fitz Stephens II was born in 1098, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Fitz Stephens, was 18 and his mother, Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens, was 18. He married Matilda de Calz in 1154, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1190, in Wapley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Fitz Stephens II est né en 1098, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Fitz Stephens, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Calz en 1154, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1190, à Wapley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Fitz Stephens II 1098 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Fitz Stephens 18 und seine Mutter Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens 18. Er hat 1154 in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda de Calz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1190 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Wapley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Fitz Stephens II è nato il nel 1098 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Fitz Stephens, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Calz nel 1154, nel Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1190, nel Wapley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Fitz Stephens IIが1098年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph Fitz Stephensは18歳，母Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephensは18歳であった。1154年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアでMatilda de Calzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1190年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアワプリーで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Fitz Stephens II(이)가 1098년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Fitz Stephens(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 Matilda de Calz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 왑리에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Fitz Stephens II nasceu em 1098, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Fitz Stephens, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Calz em 1154, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1190, em Wapley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Fitz Stephens II родился в 1098 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Fitz Stephens было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Calz в 1154 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1190 г. в местности вапли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Fitz Stephens II nació en 1098, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Fitz Stephens, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mrs. Ralph Fitz Stephens, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Matilda de Calz en 1154, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1190, en Wapley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 93 años.
